description_long: This helicopter features a streamlined fuselage with a red upper section and a blue-gray lower body, accented by a prominent cockpit with large, clear windows. The main rotor consists of four long, black blades with yellow tips, while the tail rotor at the rear has four shorter blades with similar yellow markings. The landing gear is composed of two robust wheels mounted on short struts beneath the fuselage, providing stability on the ground. The cockpit windows are expansive, wrapping around the front and sides, and are framed in black, offering excellent visibility for pilots. The body displays various access panels, doors, and small details such as lights and vents, contributing to a realistic and functional appearance. No visible registration number or alphanumeric markings are present on the exterior.
description: A red and blue-gray helicopter with large cockpit windows, four-blade main and tail rotors, and wheeled landing gear. The design is detailed with visible access panels and yellow-tipped rotor blades.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, large cockpit windows, and the full span of the main rotor blades.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, side doors, and the main and tail rotors' alignment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, tail rotor, and the tapering structure of the helicopter.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the landing gear and rotor configuration.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, straight main rotor blades made of composite material, colored black with yellow tips, each blade approximately 7 meters in length and featuring a slight taper.
attribute_tail_rotor: Four-blade tail rotor mounted vertically at the end of the tail boom, blades are black with yellow tips and arranged in a cross pattern, partially enclosed by a protective fin.
attribute_landing_skids: Not present; instead, the helicopter uses a wheeled landing gear system with two main wheels and a smaller tail wheel, all with black rubber tires and metallic struts.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Five large cockpit windows: three at the front (one central, two angled sides) and two on each side, all clear with black framing and slightly curved for aerodynamics.
